title: Ao-chan Can't Study!
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12 episodes (TV_SHORT format). Manga complete at 39 chapters across 8 volumes. The anime adapts roughly chapters 1-20 (skipping a handful of chapters along the way, e.g. ch. 8, 10, 11, 13), leaving ch. 21-39 unadapted. No distinct named story arcs — episodic romantic-comedy chapters. A separate sequel manga ('Adult Arc') covering the characters' university years is not covered by this anime and is out of scope.
